title: RUSTINS ALWP1000 1L Aluminium Wood Primer
availability_text: Only 3 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Durable Undercoat for Superior Wood Protection: Rustins Aluminium Wood Primer provides a strong, reliable base, safeguarding wood surfaces against moisture and environmental damage
Versatile Application for Various Projects: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, this primer is perfect for wood furniture, doors, windows, and other wooden surfaces
Quick-Drying Formula for Time-Saving Projects: Rustins Aluminium Wood Primer dries efficiently, allowing for faster application of topcoats without compromising its durability; ADD TO BASKET now
Enhanced Adhesion for Long-Lasting Results: This primer ensures better adhesion of topcoats, creating a smooth and stable foundation for paints and varnishes

Trusted Brand Delivering Reliable Solutions: Rustins is a trusted name in surface preparation, offering high-quality products that deliver consistent and good results for DIY and professional projects
description: From the manufacturer About Us Established in 1924, Rustins is a leading British manufacturer of wood finishes, speciality paints and performance household cleaners. We produce our range at our factory in North London, using new materials and technologies whilst maintaining our heritage of excellence and quality. Our brands include Rustins, Briwax, Antiquax, Wudcare, Stones, Brummer, Heldite, Oven Mate, Bondaglass, Lord Sheraton, Big D, Hotspot and Peek. Each brand has its own formulations and products. In addition to the UK market, we export to over 30 countries. Description Similar in composition to pink and white wood primers Contains aluminium pigment Provides better water resistance.
